reviews.review_description:
the app is very good fun as you can meet up in the room and all watch the video together and you can chat live with the youtube creator during the live stream you can also react with sound effects..
i really enjoyed talking and not having to type messages..
i would recommend it. Great Fun

developer_response.body: We really appreciate it Paw!! Hope to see you in more streams soon :)

reviews.review_description: It super good for watching youtube with friends I just get a little motion sickness when I play this game

developer_response.body: We really appreciate it!!! And we will do our best to improve the motion sickness aspect. Do you prefer teleportation to walking around? Were things moving too quickly? We'd love to get more info if you're willing: spectate3d@gmail.com

reviews.review_description: With the reference of the big screen, I did not find a benefit in this application, access to different environments? Nothing new, some motion sickness and 0 (zero) users in the app, maybe it's me, maybe I didn't understand how to do something simple like find users to interact with or maybe a lot of work ahead, good luck!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the feedback!! We've just pushed an update which will hopefully make it less lonely in there. Noted on the motion sickness! And yes we still have a very long way to go

reviews.review_description: Really Fun And Nice To Play With Friends!

developer_response.body: Really appreciate it!! Still a lot of work to do but thank you for the kind words
